questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to DDL vs DML?
options: Inefficient scaling of Data Definition vs Data Manipulation transactional boundary differences.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Data Definition vs Data Manipulation transactional boundary differences.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Data Definition vs Data Manipulation transactional boundary differences scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
